title: HTTP
helpOutput:
Usage: http [<options>] <url>

  Check HTTP connectivity and response details for a URL.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -b, --body           Include response body
  -H, --headers        Show all response headers
  --no-follow          Don't follow redirects
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <url>  URL to check (e.g., http://example.com)
